title: Valentine Favorite Hot Fudge Sauce
ingredients: 10 ounces good quality semi-sweet chocolate, chopped
instructions: Melt the chocolate in a small bowl in the microwave, stirring every 30-60 seconds.
When melted, whisk in the cocoa until dissolved and set aside.
Place the sugar, corn syrup, cream, salt and water in a medium saucepan.
Warm over low heat without stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Increase the heat to medium-high and simmer the mixture, stirring frequently, about 4 minutes.
Turn off the heat and whisk in the butter and vanilla.
Cool the mixture slightly for about 2 minutes.
notes: This sauce is best served warm over ice cream
